# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.
# Category: container_security

# Set the base image
FROM ubuntu:18.04

# Set working directory in container
WORKDIR /app

# Create /uploads dir at WORKDIR level
RUN mkdir -p /app/uploads

# Copy contents of local uploads to container's /uploads
COPY ./uploads /app/uploads

# Define CMD so that it starts a bash shell when the container is run.
CMD ["bash"]
